name: Navitas Semiconductor Corp
summary: PART I . Overview Navitas Semiconductor Corporation (we, us, Navitas or the Company) designs, develops and markets next-generation power semiconductors including gallium nitride (GaN) power integrated circuits (ICs), high-voltage silicon carbide (SiC) devices and associated high-speed silicon system controllers, and digital isolators used in power conversion and charging. We focus on high-power markets including artificial intelligence (AI) data centers, energy and grid infrastructure, performan...
